title: Redfin Valuation Scraper
description: Get Redfin home value estimates by property ID. Use property_ids or properties to batch multiple valuations in one Apify run.

property_id.title: Property ID
property_id.description: Redfin property ID, usually the number after /home/ in a Redfin URL.

listing_id.title: Listing ID
listing_id.description: Optional Redfin listing ID. Usually not needed; include it when you already have a listing-specific ID from Redfin search or property details.

url.title: Redfin URL
url.description: Optional Redfin property URL. The actor extracts the property ID from URLs containing /home/{property_id}.

property_ids.title: Batch Property IDs
property_ids.description: Run multiple Redfin property valuations in one Apify run. When provided, top-level property_id, listing_id, and url fields are ignored.

properties.title: Batch Properties
properties.description: Run multiple Redfin valuations with per-property listing IDs or URLs. When provided, this takes precedence over property_ids.
